title: Overview
subtitle: Core Call Routing & Signaling Platform
description: Cisco Unified Communications Manager (CUCM) is the central call-routing and signaling engine within Cisco Collaboration Architecture. It functions as an enterprise-grade IP PBX responsible for endpoint registration, call processing, dial-plan execution, session control, and communication policy enforcement across enterprise networks.

points.title: Call Processing & Routing
points.desc: Routes calls using Route Patterns, Route Lists and Route Groups across internal networks, remote sites and PSTN gateways.

points.title: Device Management
points.desc: Provides phone configuration, firmware distribution and TFTP services for endpoint provisioning.

points.title: Enterprise Features
points.desc: Supports call forwarding, transfer, hold, shared lines and extension mobility.

points.title: High Availability
points.desc: Uses Publisher-Subscriber architecture to ensure resiliency, scalability and continuous call processing.
